plan: Identify the customer's account using the zip code 32286 and the name Isabella Johansson to locate the relevant orders.
Locate the specific items in question: the hose, the backpack, and the hiking boots from the order history.
Simultaneously present both requests to the agent: return the hose and backpack, and exchange the hiking boots for the waterproof version of the same item.
If the agent can only process one request, clarify that the exchange of the hiking boots for the waterproof version is the priority.
Confirm the exchange details — same hiking boots, same size/color, but waterproof variant — to ensure accuracy.
If the exchange is approved, verify the return shipping or swap logistics for the boots.
If both requests can be handled, proceed with the return of the hose and backpack and confirm refund method and timeline.
Request confirmation of all actions taken (exchange order number, return label, refund estimate) to close out the interaction quickly.
